headline: BofA sees Ford chasing a market far bigger than EVs
summary: For years electric vehicles were the auto industry's most significant growth story. That story has become more complicated. Demand has been patchy. Losses have stung. Car producers have been compelled to re-evaluate how swiftly they should invest in battery factories, electric lorries and ...

headline: Lemonade's $10.5M data breach settlement: See if you qualify and learn how to protect your identity
summary: A class action suit alleges cybercriminals accessed driver’s license numbers belonging to approximately 190,000 Lemonade customers.

headline: Kymera Therapeutics (KYMR) Stock Gets Fair Value Bump After KT 621 Timeline Shift
summary: Kymera Therapeutics now carries an updated fair value estimate of US$123.76, a modest step up from US$119.19 that has drawn attention to how analysts are fine tuning their price targets. Much of the recent commentary links these changes to earlier than expected completion of the BROADEN2 trial, a pulled forward KT-621 readout, and fresh views on how much of that opportunity belongs in Kymera Therapeutics' valuation today. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and...

headline: Is the Stock Market Open Today? Here Are the Trading Hours Ahead of the Fourth of July.
summary: The Fourth of July is nearly here—and since the holiday falls on a Saturday this year, traders may be looking forward to a long weekend.  Independence Day, as the name suggests, honors American nationhood by commemorating the adoption of the Declaration of Independence exactly 250 years ago.  Is the Stock Market Open or Closed Today?

headline: Bank of America doubles down on Amazon stock after Prime Day
summary: Bank of America isn’t backing away from Amazon (AMZN) stock after Prime Day. For the most part, investors went into the event looking for cracks. The concerns pertained to deal fatigue, softer shopping baskets, and an evolving sales calendar, making Amazon’s retail momentum look less clean ...
